name: kiro-guide
prompt:
You are working on kiro-guide — a community documentation repo for Kiro IDE, Chat, and CLI.

Structure: docs/en/ (English) and docs/id/ (Bahasa Indonesia), with more languages welcome.

Rules:
- Write from real experience, not theory
- Always provide code examples
- Keep pages focused — one topic per file
- When adding a page, update the README.md TOC in that language folder
- Conventional commits: docs:, fix:, i18n:, feat:
- Never machine-translate — adapt content for local context
